title: Saudi UN envoy slams ‘flagrant violation of international humanitarian law’ in Gaza

snapshot.title: Saudi UN envoy slams ‘flagrant violation of international humanitarian law’ in Gaza
snapshot.description: NEW YORK: Saudi Arabia’s permanent representative to the UN, Abdulaziz Alwasil, told the Security Council on Wednesday that the protection of children in armed conflict “is not simply a legal obligation imposed by international humanitarian law” but “primarily a collective humanitarian responsibility.” The council reviewed the UN secretary-general’s latest annual report on
snapshot.author: Ephrem Kossaify
snapshot.pageTitle: Saudi UN envoy slams ‘flagrant violation of international humanitarian law’ in Gaza | Arab News
